em_groove.name: em groove · 100bpm
em_groove.description: looping i-bIII-bVII-iv. classic minor pent. playground.

pop_c.name: I-V-vi-IV · 95bpm
pop_c.description: the pop progression. C major or A minor pent both work.

g_classic.name: G I-IV-V · 110bpm
g_classic.description: country / folk staple. major pent. lean on the 3rds.

d_pop.name: D I-V-vi-IV · 100bpm
d_pop.description: anthemic. hits the same nerve as half of modern pop.

jazz_ii_v_i.name: jazz ii-V-I in C · 110bpm
jazz_ii_v_i.description: resolve every phrase to a chord tone of Cmaj7.

dorian_d.name: D dorian vamp · 90bpm
dorian_d.description: two-chord modal vamp. the natural 6 (B) is the magic note.

country_g.name: country shuffle G · 110bpm
country_g.description: shuffle the 8ths. major pent + the 6 sounds country.

reggae_em.name: reggae · em-d · 80bpm
reggae_em.description: off-beat upstrokes. minor pent + dorian sound great.

ballad_f.name: ballad in F · 70bpm
ballad_f.description: slow, leave space. major pent or sus chord arpeggios.

latin_am.name: latin in Am · 100bpm
latin_am.description: harmonic minor over the E7. that exotic flavor.
